what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG line icon showing a cloud outline with an upward arrow, using currentColor for its stroke.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox 0 0 24 24 with no fill.
Stroke is currentColor with stroke-width 1.5, round caps, and round joins.
The first path draws the cloud outline.
The second path draws a vertical upward arrow.
standouts: Color is inherited from surrounding text or CSS via currentColor.
conventions: Follows a common 24x24 stroke icon convention.
Uses fill="none" and rounded stroke styling for a line icon.
Keeps geometry inline in path data without embedded metadata.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are included for intrinsic accessibility semantics.
notes: A reusable cloud upload line icon asset whose appearance is controlled by inherited color.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by the consuming component or should the SVG carry its own metadata?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename suggests a cloud-up icon, and the SVG content matches that purpose.
intention_signals: It seems intended to serve as a scalable UI icon for a cloud upload or upward cloud transfer action.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable cloud upload glyph that a fused system would keep as an action icon asset.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting a cloud outline with an upward arrow.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing cloud upload or upward cloud transfer in an interface.
